case_title: ELLISON ENTERPRISE CORP VS FARMER'S PRODUCE MARKET

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $512.95 FILED BY ELLISON ENTERPRISE CORP AS TO DEFENDANT FARMER'S PRODUCE MARKET ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-17-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 06
CERT. RECEIPT TO SHEN (FARMER'S PRODUCE MARKET) RETURNED SIGNED.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ELLISON ENTERPRISE CORP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FARMER'S PRODUCE MARKET $512.95 PRINCIPAL, $12.79 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $525.74 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
